_comment: Pinned inputs for the build appliance (tools/build_appliance.ts).
Nothing is trusted by URL: every artifact is verified against the sha256
recorded here, so a fetch is a pure function of its pins and the cache is
safely shareable. Alpine publishes .sha256, .sha512 and a GPG .asc for
both of these artifacts; the digests below are the published ones.
To move to a new Alpine release, update `version`, refresh all four
digests from the published .sha256 sidecars, and rebuild both targets.
Alpine garbage-collects superseded packages, so a stale pin eventually
stops resolving -- that is a loud 404, never a silent substitution.
